CVE-2021-39358.title: In GNOME libgfbgraph through 0.2.4, gfbgraph-photo.c does not ena ...
CVE-2021-39358.summary: In GNOME libgfbgraph through 0.2.4, gfbgraph-photo.c does not enable TLS certificate verification on the SoupSessionSync objects it creates, leaving users vulnerable to network MITM attacks. NOTE: this is similar to CVE-2016-20011.
